hero.lede: Track holdings, returns, and cashflows with the rigour of institutional tools — fully offline, fully yours.

fresh.title: Start fresh
fresh.body: Create a brand-new empty portfolio and add transactions as you go.

demo.title: Try the demo
demo.body: Explore the app with a realistic sample portfolio you can edit freely.

import.title: Import existing data
import.body: Bring data in from Portfolio Performance or restore a quovibe backup.

errors.duplicateName: A portfolio with this name already exists.

hub.title: Import existing data
hub.subtitle: Bring data in from an external source. A new portfolio will be created for you.

ppXml.title: Portfolio Performance (XML)
ppXml.body: An XML export from the Portfolio Performance desktop app. Make sure ID attributes are included.
ppXml.pickFile: Drop XML file here or click to browse
ppXml.nameOptional: Portfolio name (optional — defaults to file name)

quovibeDb.title: Restore from quovibe backup
quovibeDb.body: Import a .db file previously exported from quovibe. Useful when migrating machines or recovering from backup.
quovibeDb.pickFile: Drop .db file here or click to browse

csvHint.title: CSV import
csvHint.body: CSV import requires an existing portfolio. Start fresh first, then open Settings → Import CSV from inside your new portfolio.

errors.invalidFile: Not a valid XML export. Expected a .xml file from Portfolio Performance.
errors.tooLarge: File exceeds the upload size limit.
errors.binary: File appears to be binary or corrupted. Expected a plain-text XML export.
